roles.name: Carpenter
roles.description: Repairs house damage. Both Carpenters must work together to fully fix the house.

events.name: Earthquake
events.hint: The ground is shaking! Everyone brace and hang on!

events.name: Typhoon
events.hint: Fierce winds and flying debris are battering the house!

events.name: Tsunami
events.hint: Water is rising fast — get to higher ground!

events.name: Meteor Strike
events.hint: Meteors are falling from the sky — take cover!
